projectDescription: A sovereign financial intelligence terminal that combines AI-driven trading, real-world asset tokenization, and decentralized governance in a single institutional-grade dashboard.
keyFeatures: Sovereign Link — QR-based biometric authentication via Vexel Mobile
Yield Velocity — real-time per-second capital growth tracking
AI Proactive Signals — autonomous buy/sell recommendations with one-tap approval
RWA Nexus — tokenized real-world assets (gold, real estate, institutional debt) with audit reports
Neural Strategist — no-code visual canvas for building automated trading strategies
Sovereign DAO Governance — on-chain proposal voting with Neural Consensus analysis
Lattice Security — quantum-resistant cryptographic signing protocol
Dual-state Dashboard — Collective Mode (guest) and Sovereign Mode (authenticated)
Multi-language support — English and Spanish UI
Vexel AI Chat — voice and text command interface for market analysis and trade execution
publicApiSurface: GET /api/market/trending — trending asset signals with AI confidence scores
POST /api/market/execute — submit a sovereign swap/trade order
Socket.io: registerSession — register a browser session for Sovereign Link
Socket.io: sessionLinked — event fired when mobile QR scan completes auth
Socket.io: marketPulse — real-time portfolio and confidence updates from the Mesh
Socket.io: action_completed — trade execution confirmation with audit ID
Socket.io: session_revoked — forced logout event from mobile
